Record.EXTRACTCALCLOGIC:
IF SUBSTR({first},5,1) BEGINS_WITH "2" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR( {ContainsTestPath.secondEight} ,2,2) BEGINS_WITH "B4" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR(PRIOR({firstEight}),4,4) BEGINS_WITH "01" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR (COL.3,3,8) BEGINS_WITH "44" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR (COL.2,2,3) BEGINS_WITH "44" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR({first},5,1) ENDS_WITH "2" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR( {ContainsTestPath.secondEight} ,2,4) ENDS_WITH "45" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR(PRIOR({firstEight}),5,4) ENDS_WITH "11" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR (COL.3,5,8) ENDS_WITH "66" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF

IF SUBSTR (COL.2,1,6) ENDS_WITH "22" THEN
COLUMN = "Y"
ELSE
COLUMN = "N"
ENDIF
